tasks.prompt: Pure black line art ONLY on white background. NO filled colors, NO gray shading, NO gradients, NO pre-colored areas. Every region must be empty white inside the outlines, ready for kids to color. Classic Hello Kitty Sanrio style outline, no mouth, whiskers, bow as empty outline only. Scene: Hello Kitty with backpack and school supplies on first day of school. Printable kids coloring page.
